title: astragalus cryptobotrys
intro: Astragalus cryptobotrys is a type of plant belonging to the legume family and is also known as the 'saltwort' or 'wild licorice'. It is native to parts of North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which may contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing stress and improving immune function. Astragalus cryptobotrys can be prepared into teas, capsules, or infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
